SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(utc_time, 'UTC') AS date_time_utc FROM timestamps;
SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(utc_time) AS date_time_default_timezone FROM timestamps;
WITH (SELECT MAX(utc_time) FROM timestamps) AS max_time SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(max_time, 'Europe/Moscow') AS max_date_time_moscow;
WITH (SELECT MIN(utc_time) FROM timestamps) AS min_time SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(min_time) AS min_date_time_default_timezone;
SELECT utc_time, fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(utc_time, 'America/New_York') AS date_time_ny FROM timestamps WHERE utc_time > 0;
CREATE TABLE timezones (name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY name;
SELECT t.name, fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(ts.utc_time, t.name) AS converted_time FROM timestamps ts CROSS JOIN timezones t;
WITH (SELECT CAST(1234567891011 AS Int64)) AS test_time SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(test_time, 'Asia/Kolkata') AS test_date_time;
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(utc_time, 'UTC') AS utc_time_converted FROM timestamps;
SELECT count(*) FROM results WHERE utc_time_converted IS NOT NULL;
WITH (SELECT AVG(utc_time) FROM timestamps) AS avg_time SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(avg_time, 'Australia/Sydney') AS avg_date_time_sydney;
CREATE TABLE mixed_data (time_value Int64, timezone String);
SELECT time_value, fromUnixTimestamp64Milli(time_value, timezone) AS local_time FROM mixed_data;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM timestamps) AS total_records SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Milli((SELECT max(utc_time) FROM timestamps), 'UTC') AS last_record_time, total_records;
SELECT FROM_UNIX_TIMESTAMP64_MILLI(utc_time, 'Invalid/Timezone') AS invalid_timezone FROM timestamps;
